title: Loguetown Becomes Dangerous
description: On pages 17–18, loguetown becomes dangerous focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.
scene: On pages 17–18, loguetown becomes dangerous focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as luffy explores the town of the Pirate King while Buggy and Alvida prepare revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Good thing I managed to run into you.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Oh yeah, I happened to see a lion just a little while ago. But there was this weird looking guy in a costume riding on it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why the heck do I have to carry the heavier side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's odd...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It seems to be getting less crowded here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The air pressure is dropping abnormal- ally.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It might be best to quickly return to the ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Ah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So where is he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He said he wanted to check out the execution stand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Isn't the execution stand right here in the town square?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Ah, CPT. Smoker and Sergeant major tashig!!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: What's the status?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They've rounded up the civilians to watch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There are currently 3 people with bouties in the town square right now.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: The club- wielding AlVida

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Buggy the clown,

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: and strawhat Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Luffy? That's a name I've never heard of.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: His bounty just came out the other day but it's a real big one at 30 million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 30 million!? He should be quite the tough one then.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, Umm...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's actually the one,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Dammit, I can't scratch my nose.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: about to be killed right now.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why the hell is he on the execution stand!?

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
